traces.question: top 5 các khánh hàng mua nhiều hàng nhất và loại hàng họ đã mua nhiều nhất?
traces.sql:
WITH CustomerCategorySales AS (
    SELECT
        i.CustomerKey,
        pc.ProductCategoryKey,
        SUM(i.OrderQuantity) AS TotalQuantityByCategory
    FROM internet_sales i
    JOIN products p ON i.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
    JOIN product_subcategories ps ON p.ProductSubcategoryKey = ps.ProductSubcategoryKey
    JOIN product_categories pc ON ps.ProductCategoryKey = pc.ProductCategoryKey
    GROUP BY i.CustomerKey, pc.ProductCategoryKey
),
MaxCategoryPerCustomer AS (
    SELECT
        CustomerKey,
        ProductCategoryKey,
        TotalQuantityByCategory,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY CustomerKey ORDER BY TotalQuantityByCategory DESC) AS RankCategory
    FROM CustomerCategorySales
),
TopCategoryPerCustomer AS (
    SELECT
        CustomerKey,
        ProductCategoryKey,
        TotalQuantityByCategory
    FROM MaxCategoryPerCustomer
    WHERE RankCategory = 1
),
CustomerTotalSales AS (
    SELECT
        CustomerKey,
        SUM(OrderQuantity) AS TotalQuantity
    FROM internet_sales
    GROUP BY CustomerKey
),
TopCustomers AS (
    SELECT TOP 5
        cts.CustomerKey,
        cts.TotalQuantity
    FROM CustomerTotalSales cts
    ORDER BY cts.TotalQuantity DESC
)
SELECT
    tc.CustomerKey,
    ISNULL(c.FirstName, '') + ' ' + ISNULL(c.LastName, '') AS CustomerName, -- Tên khách hàng
    tc.TotalQuantity, -- Tổng số lượng mua
    pc.EnglishProductCategoryName AS TopProductCategory -- Loại hàng mua nhiều nhất
FROM TopCustomers tc
JOIN TopCategoryPerCustomer tcc ON tc.CustomerKey = tcc.CustomerKey
JOIN product_categories pc ON tcc.ProductCategoryKey = pc.ProductCategoryKey
JOIN customers c ON tc.CustomerKey = c.CustomerKey
ORDER BY tc.TotalQuantity DESC;

)

    ISNULL(TotalInternetSales, 0) + ISNULL(TotalResellerSales, 0) AS TotalSalesAmount
FROM MonthlyRevenue

traces.question: CÁC KHÁCH HÀNG MUA HÀNG NHIỀU NHẤT VÀ MÓN HỌ MUA
traces.sql:
WITH CustomerTotalQuantity AS (
    SELECT
        CustomerKey,
        SUM(OrderQuantity) AS TotalQuantityPerCustomer
    FROM internet_sales
    GROUP BY CustomerKey
),
MaxCustomer AS (
    SELECT TOP 1
        CustomerKey,
        TotalQuantityPerCustomer
    FROM CustomerTotalQuantity
    ORDER BY TotalQuantityPerCustomer DESC
),
CustomerProductQuantity AS (
    SELECT
        i.CustomerKey,
        i.ProductKey,
        SUM(i.OrderQuantity) AS QuantityPerProduct
    FROM internet_sales i
    JOIN MaxCustomer mc ON i.CustomerKey = mc.CustomerKey
    GROUP BY i.CustomerKey, i.ProductKey
)
SELECT
    c.CustomerKey,
    ISNULL(c.FirstName, '') + ' ' + ISNULL(c.LastName, '') AS CustomerName, -- Tên khách hàng
    p.EnglishProductName, -- Tên sản phẩm
    cpq.QuantityPerProduct, -- Số lượng mua từng sản phẩm
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY cpq.QuantityPerProduct DESC) AS Ranking
FROM CustomerProductQuantity cpq
JOIN customers c ON cpq.CustomerKey = c.CustomerKey
JOIN products p ON cpq.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
ORDER BY cpq.QuantityPerProduct DESC;

    SELECT ProductKey

    WHERE ListPrice > 1000
),

traces.question: Tỷ lệ khách hàng mới so với tổng khách hàng
traces.sql:
WITH
  new_customers AS (
    DECLARE @StartDate DATE = '2023-01-01';
DECLARE @EndDate DATE = '2023-12-31';

SELECT
  CustomerKey, -- Mã khách hàng
  CustomerAlternateKey, -- Mã khách hàng thay thế
  Title, -- Danh xưng
  FirstName, -- Tên
  MiddleName, -- Tên đệm
  LastName, -- Họ
  BirthDate, -- Ngày sinh
  EmailAddress, -- Email
  DateFirstPurchase -- Ngày mua đầu tiên
FROM [dbo].[DimCustomer]
WHERE DateFirstPurchase BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate
ORDER BY DateFirstPurchase
  ),
  total_customers AS (
    WITH CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT CustomerKey, OrderDate
    FROM [dbo].[FactInternetSales]
    WHERE OrderDate IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT CustomerKey, OrderDate
    FROM [dbo].[FactResellerSales]
    WHERE OrderDate IS NOT NULL
),
DateRange AS (
    SELECT MIN(OrderDate) AS MinOrderDate, MAX(OrderDate) AS MaxOrderDate
    FROM CustomerOrders
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerKey) AS TotalCustomers
FROM CustomerOrders, DateRange
WHERE OrderDate BETWEEN MinOrderDate AND MaxOrderDate
  )
WITH new_customers AS (
    -- Giả sử CTE này đã được định nghĩa lấy các khách hàng lần đầu mua hàng trong khoảng thời gian
    SELECT DISTINCT CustomerKey
    FROM [dbo].[FactInternetSales]
    WHERE OrderDate >= DATEADD(year, -1, GETDATE()) -- ví dụ 1 năm gần đây
),

total_customers AS (
    -- Giả sử CTE này đã được định nghĩa lấy tổng số khách hàng có giao dịch
    SELECT DISTINCT CustomerKey
    FROM [dbo].[FactInternetSales]
    WHERE OrderDate >= DATEADD(year, -1, GETDATE())
)

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM new_customers) AS NewCustomerCount, -- Số khách hàng mới
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM total_customers) AS TotalCustomerCount, -- Tổng số khách hàng
    CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM new_customers) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM total_customers), 0) AS NewCustomerRatio -- Tỷ lệ khách hàng mới

WITH
  category_revenue AS (
    SELECT pc.EnglishProductCategoryName AS ProductCategory, SUM(isales.SalesAmount) AS TotalSalesAmount
FROM [dbo].[FactInternetSales] isales
JOIN [dbo].[DimProduct] p ON isales.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
JOIN [dbo].[DimProductSubcategory] psc ON p.ProductSubcategoryKey = psc.ProductSubcategoryKey
JOIN [dbo].[DimProductCategory] pc ON psc.ProductCategoryKey = pc.ProductCategoryKey

FROM [dbo].[DimProduct] p
JOIN [dbo].[DimProductSubcategory] ps ON p.ProductSubcategoryKey = ps.ProductSubcategoryKey
JOIN top_category tc ON ps.ProductCategoryKey = tc.ProductCategoryKey
  )
SELECT st.SalesTerritoryRegion AS [Địa điểm bán hàng], SUM(isales.SalesAmount) AS [Tổng doanh thu]
FROM [dbo].[FactInternetSales] isales
JOIN products_in_top_category pitc ON isales.ProductKey = pitc.ProductKey
JOIN [dbo].[DimSalesTerritory] st ON isales.SalesTerritoryKey = st.SalesTerritoryKey

traces.question: tên các khách hàng mua nhiều xe đạp nhất trong khu vực có doanh thu cao nhất
traces.sql:
WITH RevenueByTerritory AS (
    SELECT TOP 1 st.SalesTerritoryKey, SUM(ISNULL(rs.SalesAmount,0) + ISNULL(isales.SalesAmount,0)) AS TotalRevenue
    FROM sales_territory st
    LEFT JOIN reseller_sales rs ON st.SalesTerritoryKey = rs.SalesTerritoryKey
    LEFT JOIN internet_sales isales ON st.SalesTerritoryKey = isales.SalesTerritoryKey
    GROUP BY st.SalesTerritoryKey
    ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC
),
BicycleProducts AS (
    SELECT p.ProductKey
    FROM products p
    WHERE LOWER(p.EnglishProductName) LIKE '%bike%' OR LOWER(p.EnglishProductName) LIKE '%bicycle%'
),
CustomerBicycleQty AS (
    SELECT c.CustomerKey, SUM(ISNULL(isales.OrderQuantity,0) + ISNULL(rs.OrderQuantity,0)) AS TotalBicycleQty
    FROM customers c
    JOIN geography g ON c.GeographyKey = g.GeographyKey
    JOIN RevenueByTerritory rbt ON g.SalesTerritoryKey = rbt.SalesTerritoryKey
    LEFT JOIN internet_sales isales ON c.CustomerKey = isales.CustomerKey
        AND isales.ProductKey IN (SELECT ProductKey FROM BicycleProducts)
    LEFT JOIN reseller_sales rs ON rs.ResellerKey IN (
        SELECT ResellerKey FROM resellers WHERE GeographyKey = c.GeographyKey
    ) AND rs.ProductKey IN (SELECT ProductKey FROM BicycleProducts)
    GROUP BY c.CustomerKey
),
TopCustomer AS (
    SELECT TOP 1 cbq.CustomerKey, cbq.TotalBicycleQty
    FROM CustomerBicycleQty cbq
    ORDER BY cbq.TotalBicycleQty DESC
)
SELECT c.CustomerKey, c.FirstName + ' ' + c.LastName AS CustomerFullName, tc.TotalBicycleQty
FROM TopCustomer tc
JOIN customers c ON tc.CustomerKey = c.CustomerKey
ORDER BY tc.TotalBicycleQty DESC
